data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for specific task types: upload document, watch video, purchase item, confirm understanding. However, the evidence provided only confirms the task 'watch video' as completed, while there is no evidence for the other required task types. This indicates a gap in the coverage of the requirement, as the evidence does not confirm that all specified task types are implemented and functioning as required.
gaps: No evidence of task types: upload document, purchase item, confirm understanding.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
